summary_text: **Existing Duplicate-Prevention Coverage** - Queue-internal exact duplicate blocking is covered in [test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L637) (`_check_queue_internal_duplicates` keeps earliest approved, blocks later exact-text rows). - Posted-history exact duplicate blocking is covered in [test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L667) (`_validate_pre_post` returns `"duplicate of recently posted content"` for exact hash match). - Queue-level duplicate state check (`duplicate_blocked`) is covered in [test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L691). - Merge-time exact duplicate handling before due selection is covered in [test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L711). - Similarity algorithm unit tests exist but only generic identical/different text in [test_similarity.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_similarity.py#L75). - Pre-approval bundle duplicate test only checks queue duplicate exact-prefix behavior in [test_prepare_post_bundle.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_prepare_post_bundle.py#L116). **Coverage Gap (incident-shaped)** Missing scenario: **new approved row is near-identical (not exact hash) to an older post already posted earlier the same day**. - Creation/approval path currently checks posted-history duplicates by exact SHA only in [prepare_post_bundle.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/prepare_post_bundle.py#L57), so near-identical text can still be approved. - Scheduler has a similarity guard in [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L277), but there is no regression test proving this same-day near-identical case is blocked in runtime flow (`_post_due_jobs`). - There is no test asserting the `"too similar to recent post"` branch in scheduler. **Precise Regression Tests To Add** 1. File: [test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py) Add `test_validate_pre_post_blocks_same_day_near_identical_post` - Seed `logs/posted.json` with one post posted today (`posted_at` within same day), text A. - Candidate approved post uses text B (near-identical, different hash/signature). - Assert `can_post is False` and reason starts with `"too similar to recent post"`. 2. File: [test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py) Add `test_post_due_jobs_fails_due_row_on_same_day_near_identical_history` - Seed local queue with one due approved candidate (all QA/image gates valid). - Seed posted history with near-identical earlier-today post. - Run `_post_due_jobs(now)` and assert: - candidate status becomes `failed` - `failure_reason` includes `"too similar to recent post"` - `post_tweet` / `post_tweet_with_image` not called. 3. File: [test_prepare_post_bundle.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_prepare_post_bundle.py) Add `test_prepare_post_blocks_same_day_near_identical_posted_history` - Intended as policy regression for “don’t approve near-duplicates at draft/apply time.” - This will likely fail with current logic (exact-hash only), which is useful to pin the incident and drive fix. 4. Optional hardening file: [test_similarity.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_similarity.py) Add a calibrated near-identical pair test to lock threshold behavior (`score >= 0.4`, non-identical strings). No files were edited.
